name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
At the start of a battle, place a {Corrupted Flames} with {Exhaust} into hand, and increase the Base DMG of {Green Flames} and its related derived cards by [Arg3]%.
